hint: Kill 4 enemies in rapid succession. The Zack (Frog) mask extends the combo window time, making this much easier.
String 6 kills together. Use the Zack mask and lure enemies towards doors so you can chain kills quickly.
Chapter 10 (Hot & Heavy) and Chapter 13 (Assault) have high enemy density perfect for an 8x combo. Use the Zack mask.
Best done on Chapter 10 or 14 using the Zack mask. Map out your route, execute downed enemies quickly, and use guns to connect kills across long hallways.
Chapter 10 (Hot & Heavy) is the easiest place to do this. Wear the Zack mask. Start by clearing the initial rooms quickly, grab a shotgun, and spray down the crowded hallways to keep the combo alive.
Complete Chapter 15: Showdown to finish Jacket's storyline.
Complete Chapter 19: Resolution (the final level of Biker's campaign) to get the normal ending.

To get the secret ending, you must collect all puzzle pieces (purple pixels) hidden in Jacket's chapters, solve the puzzle in the pause menu, and interact with the computer in Chapter 19 before going into the sewers.

description: Get an A+ on any chapter
hint: Getting an A+ requires speed, high combos, flexibility (using different weapons), and boldness (melee kills grant more points). The Zack (Frog) or Carl (Locust) mask helps tremendously.

description: Get A+ on all the chapters
hint: You must achieve an A+ rank on all levels (Prelude to Chapter 19). Equip the Zack (Frog) mask to maintain combos, or the Don Juan (Horse) mask for lethal door slams (which award massive points).
Unlocks naturally as you play the game, replay chapters for masks, and grind for A+ ranks.
Dogs appear frequently in later chapters. Use guns or well-timed melee swings to kill them. Unlocks naturally over time.
Shoot or throw items through the windows in the game. You'll likely get this naturally while shooting enemies in levels like Chapter 10.
Knock an enemy down, stand over them with an Assault Rifle, Silenced Uzi, or Double Barrel Shotgun equipped, and press Space to pick them up as a shield.

description: Kill two enemies with the same brick in one throw
hint: Find a brick (common in Chapter 5) and wait for two enemies to line up in a narrow hallway before throwing it.

description: Kill three or more enemies with the same brick in one throw
hint: Best done at the start of Chapter 5. Grab the brick in the first room, attract the attention of the enemies in the hallway, line them up, and throw it.

description: Kill an enemy with a brick bounced against a wall
hint: Grab a brick, aim at a wall near an enemy so the trajectory bounces off the wall and strikes them.

description: Throw a weapon at an enemy so that his weapon hits another
hint: Throw an item at an enemy holding a weapon. The impact will cause their weapon to fly out of their hands; if it hits another enemy behind them, you get the achievement.
You get masks by reaching high score thresholds in chapters, or by finding the hidden ones (like the Crocodile mask in Chapter 7 or the Jones mask in Chapter 14).

description: Wear all masks at least once
hint: Once you have collected all 26 masks, simply start a level with each of them and immediately die or quit out to register it as 'worn'.
Weapons unlock automatically as you earn points and complete chapters. Earning A+ ranks speeds this up significantly.

description: use all guns at least once
hint: Kill an enemy with every firearm. Includes the M16, Shotgun, Double Barrel, Silenced Pistol, Silenced Uzi, Magnum, Skorpion, Uzi, MP5, and the Magnum.

description: use all melee weapon at least once
hint: Get a kill with every melee weapon. Make sure to use the rare ones like the Katana, Machete, Sledgehammer, Fire Axe, Frying Pan, Pot, and the Drill (unlocked via the Carl mask).

description: use all throwing weapon at least once
hint: Throw and kill an enemy with every throwable item: Brick, Glass Bottle, Beer Can, Dart, Ninja Star, Throwing Knife, and the Hammer.

description: Perform every ground kill in the game
hint: Knock enemies down and press Space to execute them. You must do this barehanded, near a wall (wall execution), and with EVERY melee weapon. Don't forget the Drill (Carl mask) and the Brick.
Equip the Tony (Tiger) mask, which makes your punches instantly lethal. Complete the entirety of Chapter 5 without picking up a single weapon. If you accidentally pick one up, restart.
Hotline Miami is trial and error. You will likely unlock this naturally as you grind for A+ ranks.
Earn all other achievements in the game.
Find the pot of boiling water on the stove (can be found in Chapter 2 or Chapter 6). Pick it up and throw it at an enemy to burn their face off.
Complete Chapter 2 while wearing the Nigel (Bat) mask. This mask reverses your movement controls, so take it slow.
In Chapter 7, clear the level but do not get in the car. Pick up a crowbar on the 1st floor, go outside, use the crowbar on the manhole cover, and climb down to find the Jones (Crocodile) mask.
Equip the Brandon (Panther) mask. At the start of the final boss fight, kill the two panthers that charge at you.
Walking to the car completes the level. This will unlock naturally as you replay levels to get better scores and masks.
Collect all 16 puzzle pieces. There is one small, flashing purple pixel hidden in every single chapter of Jacket's campaign (Prelude through Chapter 15).
Once you have collected all 16 puzzle pieces, go to the Puzzle section in the pause menu and arrange the letters to spell 'I WAS BORN IN THE USA'.
